verdict.note: 26 alphabetic + 21 scrambled keys via real /rawkey route both readback byte-exact

Real backend + real tmux pane running a shell. POST /api/sessions/:id/rawkey with ONE ordered 26-key batch {keys:[a..z]} (the shape the client coalescer sends) -> {ok:true}; tmux capture-pane readback of the prompt line: 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz' — character-for-character equal to strike order, none dropped, duplicated, or reordered.
